title: cassia uniflora var. ramosa
intro: Cassia uniflora var. ramosa, also known as the 'Single Flowered Senna', is a plant species that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as constipation, and other gastrointestinal problems. The health benefits of Cassia uniflora var. ramosa include its ability to stimulate bowel movements, relieve bloating, and reduce inflammation, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Cassia uniflora var. ramosa can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
